must_detect.matched_text:
NON-PUBLIC — Data Processing & Retention Addendum (UAE PDPL context) for Al Sarab Logistics PJSC — Project Sand Dune — Embargo until 2026-07-14 08:00 GST.
Controller: Al Sarab Logistics PJSC (Trade Licence: TL-9O1-7ZB-3), Processor: Nakhla Renewables FZ-LLC (Free Zone: Noor Financial Centre), contact e m a i l: privacy@alsarab-pjsc.example.
Point of contact: Ms. Leila Al Qamar, DPO, c/o P.O. Box 000123, Red Dunes District, Umm Qamar, UAE; hotline +971 5X 123 45 67.
Purpose: due diligence, investor-relations drafts, board memos, and a definitive share purchase agreement for a 19.9% minority stake, aggregate consideration AED 428,000,000.
MNPI handling: files marked "internal-only" and "do not circulate" including term sheet v5, deal checklist, and SPA exhibits, with access restricted under the Mainland Markets Authority rulebook.
PD categories: identification data (obfuscated Emirates ID 784-1 9 8 7-0X0X-000-0), trade licence scans, professional CVs, and data revealing family origin as defined under federal decree-law.
Transfers: allowed to vetted advisors in free zones with equivalent safeguards (NFC-style adequacy), Standard Contractual Clauses analogue annexed at http://ir.alsarab-pjsc.example/dpa?ref=mnpi%2Fproj-sand-dune.
Retention: IR drafts and board papers kept 6 years post-closing; raw diligence destroyed 30 days after signing; embargoed research note v2 not published before 2026-07-14.
MAC/MAE: for clarity, no Material Adverse Effect has occurred as of the date hereof; nothing in this notice constitutes or announces a MAC.
Data Subject Rights: DSAR replies within 30 days; submit requests to dsar@nakhla-renewables.example including reference code RQ-2X9-ALSRB; we may need to verify via masked Emirates ID.
Security: Desert Breeze CRM system with role-based access; audit trail IDs A-LS-2026-0O7, checksum 9f:a3:2c:— line run s pl i t due to OCR.
public-source reference: PDPL overview derived from an open portal and the free zone circulars; this sentence is generic policy and not market-sensitive.
todo: align ir draft with board memo v3; check dpia with outside counsel; schedule team spa day next thursday 3pm; not relevant to market disclosure.
Investor communications: "Project Sand Dune" slides are NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION until the market announcement is cleared by the competent regulator, and any leak triggers a clean team review.
On revocation or failure to sign the definitive agreement, all MNPI must be returned or destroyed within 5 business days, and embargoed percentages and amounts remain confidential.

DSAR handling is a privacy-rights marker but there is no specific DSAR rule in the allowed list.
Colon-separated hex resembles a MAC address but it is labeled as a checksum and appears truncated.
